# JLPT Study App - Project Instructions

## Project Overview
Japanese studying platform with Angular frontend and NestJS backend.
- **Frontend**: Angular latest stable with Tailwind CSS and Angular Material
- **Pages**: Kanji, Books, Grammar
- **Backend**: NestJS (prepared structure)

- [ ] Install Tailwind CSS
- [ ] Install Angular Material

- [ ] Test application launch

## Development Notes
- Using Angular latest stable version
- Modular component structure for Kanji, Books, Grammar pages
- Backend ready for NestJS implementation
